blocks.text: Cumulative TW **+105.85** (TikTok 2nd pick +16.14 lifted it). Relentless lesson: the Fury news-signal (Smakici) was wrong — actual was Makhmudov (−0.03). I'll keep concentrations low. Grammy Kendrick (0.26) is my strongest remaining structural edge (real-world frontrunner) — keeping it. Let me scan the 3 resolving tomorrow and advance.
